reviews.review_msg: Unclear, disorgnanized, avoid like the plague.

Awful professor. I was really looking forward to this class because students from previous years who were not taught by this professor told me how great it was. I was extremely disappointed. It's ridiculously unorganized, no clear learning objectives. No clear way to study for exams. This professor is a nice enough guy but cannot teach at all.
He doesn't teach you anything, his midterms are not based on lecture slides, or textbook. Don't take this course with him.

Horrible Prof, Doesn't teach you anything and expects you to have a background in everything (chem, bio, stats, calc) he doesn't spell very well and his assignments are riddled with mistakes. Focus on the textbook for studying because he spells major chemicals wrong and applies the same spelling in all his notes and slides.
I failed the midterm, but i got c+ on the final...his final is easy

Worse prof I have ever had. He teaches you almost nothing. Whatever he teaches you is not even on the exams which are impossible. Class average was a little over 50 on the midterm and he did not scale it. AVOID
Never take a course with him. He is insanely difficult and teaches you nothing. Assignments have nothing to do with anything. Please take my advice and avoid him.

When he teaches the course, it is a self taught course. If you are not good at math avoid him. He is easily one of the worse actual teachers I have had in three years. Half the class failed the midterm to boot.

He's a really nice person in general, but his class is super boring. Assignments are totally different from the midterm. Only up side was the midterm and final was open book. Not a class to take unless you're actually interested in statistics

Avoid his class as possible as you can.His midterm is very difficult and half a class failed the exam!Also,plenty of assignments to do...but they are useless for the exam...All in all,don't choose his class...Although he looks very nice...
